garages.name: Aria Resort & Casino
garages.notes: Standard MGM self-park. No on-site oversized; MGM directs oversized to Excalibur.

garages.name: Bellagio
garages.notes: One of the taller self-park garages on the Strip. No oversized — MGM directs to Excalibur.

garages.name: Caesars Palace
garages.notes: Low clearance. Most SUVs with roof racks will scrape.

garages.name: The Cosmopolitan
garages.notes: Two parking garages (East and West). Both low-clearance.

garages.name: Circus Circus
garages.notes: Free parking. Adjacent RV park. Ground floor and surface lots accommodate larger vehicles.

garages.name: Excalibur
garages.notes: Designated oversized/RV lot for MGM Resorts guests. Primary MGM oversized-parking destination.

garages.name: Encore at Wynn
garages.notes: Oversized vehicles can use separate lane to rooftop of 4-story garage. Limited availability.

garages.name: Flamingo
garages.notes: Caesars property. Uncovered surface lot on back side may accommodate taller vehicles.

garages.name: Four Seasons (via Mandalay)
garages.notes: Shares Mandalay Bay parking structure.

garages.name: Harrah's Las Vegas
garages.notes: Caesars property. Strip-facing entrance.

garages.name: The LINQ
garages.notes: Off-Strip entrance off Flamingo Rd/LINQ Lane. Taller than most Caesars garages.

garages.name: Luxor — Upper Garage
garages.notes: Two separate garages at Luxor. Upper garage has higher clearance.

garages.name: Luxor — Lower Garage
garages.notes: Lower garage is tighter — know which entrance you're using.

garages.name: MGM Grand Self Parking
garages.notes:
Tallest clearance among major MGM garages. No on-site oversized.
Manually verified 2026-04-22 at 8'8" (pano I70N5oiuZRckXjm1N7tmWA @ 146.5°).
Lat/lng corrected from 36.1023/-115.1707 (MGM casino/valet side) to the actual self-park garage on the east side of the property; merged with OSM entry osm-w73540518 that had the correct coords but no height.
garages.source: Manually verified from Google Street View — was: Community / signage

garages.name: The Mirage
garages.notes: Closed for renovation into Hard Rock — confirm status before relying.

garages.name: New York-New York
garages.notes: One of the lower clearance MGM garages.

garages.name: The Palazzo
garages.notes: Underground, 4 levels. No on-site oversized. Venetian shared oversized lot has 6'8" to 8'3" range.

garages.name: Paris Las Vegas
garages.notes: Shared garage access via Bally's/Horseshoe side.

garages.name: Park MGM
garages.notes: Formerly Monte Carlo. Standard MGM clearance.

garages.name: Planet Hollywood
garages.notes: Low clearance. Access via Harmon Ave.

garages.name: Resorts World
garages.notes: Opened 2021. First-hand data: designated oversized parking. Tall clearance on main levels.

garages.name: The STRAT
garages.notes: North end of Strip. Standard clearance.

garages.name: The Venetian
garages.notes: Oversized parking on ground level. Heights 6'8" to 8'3". First-come, first-served. No RV hookups. No trailers.

garages.name: Wynn Las Vegas
garages.notes: Rooftop level (accessible without going through covered garage) accommodates taller vehicles.

garages.name: Fontainebleau
garages.notes: First-hand data: tall clearance on main garage levels. Opened 2023.

garages.name: Virgin Hotels Las Vegas
garages.notes: First-hand data. Off-Strip.

garages.name: Garage Mahal (Circa)
garages.notes:
Circa's 8-story art-themed garage. Entrance height needs Street View verification. 982 spaces.
Verified 2026-04-22 from sign reading "13 FT 0 IN" (pano r6moH2JM8x4UtVE4eRlh6Q, heading 225°, Claude confidence medium)
garages.source: AI-verified (Street View + Claude Vision — auto-pano) — was: Needs verification

garages.name: Fremont Street Experience Garage
garages.notes: Max clearance 7' at entry, tapers to ~6'8" on higher floors. 1,300 spaces.

garages.name: Golden Nugget
garages.notes: Low — 6'7". Entrance on 1st Street and Bridger. No oversized.

garages.name: Downtown Grand
garages.notes: Garage accommodates vehicles up to 7'.

garages.name: City of Las Vegas Parking Garage
garages.notes: City-owned public garage. Overnight parking allowed.

garages.name: Harry Reid Airport — Terminal 1 Garage
garages.notes: Vehicles over 22' long, 8.5' wide, or 13.5' high must use oversized lots.

garages.name: Harry Reid Airport — Terminal 3 Garage
garages.notes: Oversized airport lot available separately.

garages.name: Fashion Show Mall
garages.notes:
Free mall parking. Height needs verification.
Verified 2026-04-22 from sign reading "7'0"" (pano RP-p6lDK8MO2BziOmQDJzA, heading 180°, Claude confidence medium [+1 more section(s)])

garages.name: T-Mobile Arena (NYNY Garage)
garages.notes: Event parking shares MGM garages.

UNLV PKG-2, south side of campus, entrance off E Tropicana Ave at Gym Pkwy.

garages.name: Town Square Las Vegas
garages.notes:
Open-air and garage. Surface lots accommodate oversized.

garages.name: Treasure Island — Level 2
garages.notes:
Level 2 max clearance. Levels 3+ drop to 6'10". Strip-side entrance. Sign also reads "NO RV'S OR BOX TRUCKS" — effective max is 6'10" for anything beyond Level 2.
Manually verified 2026-04-22 from the posted multi-line clearance sign (pano auBVCD5tu2sn7YggN34xDQ @ 285.35°).
garages.source: Manually verified from Google Street View — was: Parkopedia

garages.name: Treasure Island — Levels 3+
garages.notes:
Upper levels tighter than Level 2. Sign at the entrance explicitly prohibits RVs and box trucks.
Manually verified 2026-04-22 from the same posted multi-line sign (pano auBVCD5tu2sn7YggN34xDQ @ 285.35°).
garages.source: Manually verified from Google Street View — was: Parkopedia

garages.name: Sahara Las Vegas — West Garage
garages.notes: Free self-park. Low clearance.

garages.name: Sahara Las Vegas — East Garage
garages.notes: Matches West Garage — 6'8" throughout.

garages.name: Westgate — North Parking Garage
garages.notes: Off-Strip, near LVCC. 8' clearance.

garages.name: Horseshoe Las Vegas (formerly Bally's)
garages.notes: Caesars property. Oversized available in East Lot off Flamingo Rd — call 702-967-4481.

garages.name: Horseshoe — East Oversized Lot
garages.notes:
Designated oversized vehicle lot. Open air, no overhead clearance. Call 702-967-4481 for availability.

garages.name: Palms Casino Resort — VIP Garage

garages.name: Palms — Front Lot
garages.notes: Surface lot in front of property. Room for RVs (no hookups).

garages.name: Durango Casino & Resort Garage
